value: The generated file index explicitly states that `harnessiq/` is the only authoritative runtime source tree; `build/` and `src/` should not be edited for live behavior.

The public `harnessiq.interfaces` package currently uses flat modules with exported runtime-checkable protocols and lightweight callables, so a new formalization surface should remain lightweight and documentation-forward.

The user asked for the base formalization layer class and some typed base formalization objects to be added to the interfaces class, with a minimal SDK-facing change rather than a full runtime integration.

Importing `harnessiq.interfaces` through the public package surface re-entered the package via `harnessiq.shared` and tool modules; converting `harnessiq.shared.__init__` to lazy exports was required to make the new interface surface importable and testable.
